response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio confirms the Reference JSON's finding of no vocal music; the segment is purely conversational. 2. Not a song, so phonetic match is not applicable. 3. No leftover lyrics to discard. 4. Subtitles cover the full 5-minute conversation, with timestamps strictly tied to vocal bursts and pauses handled by splitting blocks to ensure accurate synchronization.

subtitles.original: いいですよ、いいですよ！いいですよ！
subtitles.english: That's good, that's good! It's great!

subtitles.original: え、でもさ、診察室だけどベッドは？ベッドどこ？あ…
subtitles.english:
Eh, but wait, this is an examination room,
but where's the bed? Where's the bed? Oh...

subtitles.original: え？何かパネルもあれなんだけど…あれ使う？
subtitles.english:
Eh? There's also that panel over there...
Should we use that?

subtitles.original:
あ、ちょっとそこ、とんでもないものがあるけど…
え、これダメなの？
subtitles.english:
Ah, wait, there's something outrageous there...
Eh, is this not allowed?

subtitles.original: そこはハートのメンゼンで使うの！
subtitles.english: That's for the heart-shaped mosaic!

subtitles.original: あ、何？そうなの？メンゼン？メンゼン？
subtitles.english: Ah, what? Is that so? Mosaic? Mosaic?

subtitles.original:
そうちょっとね、ベッドとか、撮影会とか、
シチュエーションドラマとかやろうかなと…
subtitles.english:
Yeah, I'm thinking of doing a photo shoot or
a situation drama with a bed and stuff...

subtitles.original: シチュエーションドラマ！とんでもないことをしようとしてる！
subtitles.english: Situation drama! She's trying to do something outrageous!

subtitles.original: 本当だよ！
subtitles.english: Seriously!

subtitles.original: いえ、そうなんですよ。ま、でもそれはおいといて…
subtitles.english: Yes, that's right. Well, putting that aside...

subtitles.original: あ、おいとくんだ。
subtitles.english: Oh, putting it aside.

subtitles.original: ちょっと今回は二人に撮影をしてもらいたいので、まずは…
subtitles.english:
This time, I want you two to do the photography,
so first...

subtitles.original: わかりました。撮りますよ。よいしょ。
subtitles.english: Understood. We'll take the photos. Here we go.

subtitles.original: ラミィ様には…
subtitles.english: For Lamy-sama...

subtitles.original: お！え、本格的な！すごい、カメラ来た！
subtitles.english: Oh! Eh, a professional one! Amazing, a camera!

subtitles.original: そしてノエル様にはこちらの、じゃん！
subtitles.english: And for Noel-sama, this one, ta-da!

subtitles.original: なんだい、これ？
subtitles.english: What's this?

subtitles.original: ちょこのギリギリを守るために特別に作られたモザイク棒です！
subtitles.english:
It's a mosaic stick specially made
to protect Choco's limits!

subtitles.original: 特別、すげー！チョコモザイク来た！
subtitles.english: Special... incredible! Choco mosaic is here!

subtitles.original: そう、ボタンでこのモザイクの粗さを変えれるらしい…
subtitles.english:
Yeah, apparently you can change the intensity
of the mosaic with a button...

subtitles.original: 今めっちゃ粗くなってるから…
subtitles.english: It's really coarse right now...

subtitles.original: あ、本当、薄くできる！本当だ！
subtitles.english: Ah, really, it can be made thinner! It's true!

subtitles.original: すげー、でもなんか粗いほうがむしろいいまであるなこれ。
subtitles.english:
Incredible, but the coarser one
might actually be better.

subtitles.original: 確かに。隠すや？これ大丈夫かな？
subtitles.english: True. Hide it? Is this okay?

subtitles.original: でも配信、ちょっと守りますよ。ちょこの配信を守ってください！
subtitles.english:
But the stream, I'll protect it.
Please protect Choco's stream!

subtitles.original: 頑張ります！頑張ります！
subtitles.english: We'll do our best! We'll do our best!

subtitles.original: それでは撮影会、スタート！
subtitles.english: Now then, photo shoot, start!

subtitles.original: イエーイ！まずはやっぱ全身。
subtitles.english: Yay! First, the full body.

subtitles.original: そうだね。そうだよね。普通にこうね、ちょっと…
subtitles.english: Right. Yeah. Just normally like this, a bit...

subtitles.original: ポーズ。いつものチョコ先の…こんな感じ？
subtitles.english: Pose. Choco-sen's usual... like this?

subtitles.original: ああ！美しい、こう…
subtitles.english: Ah! Beautiful, this way...

subtitles.original: 美しい！
subtitles.english: Beautiful!

subtitles.original: ああ、いいねいいね。え、でもここちょっとまずいんじゃないの？ここ。
subtitles.english:
Ah, nice, nice. Eh, but isn't this
a bit dangerous? Here.

subtitles.original: まずいかな？あら、逆に？え、逆に？
subtitles.english: Is it dangerous? Oh, conversely? Eh, conversely?

subtitles.original: ちょっと、結構ノリノリなんですけど！
subtitles.english: Wait, she's actually really into it!

subtitles.original: まずいかな？ちょっちょっちょっとね…
subtitles.english: Is it dangerous? Wait, just a bit...

subtitles.original: ちょっとここ揺れてめっちゃ…モザイクだ！モザイクが追いついてない！
subtitles.english:
Wait, it's shaking here so much...
It's mosaic! The mosaic can't keep up!

subtitles.original: 追いついてない！じゃ、ノエル様頑張って！頑張ります！
subtitles.english:
It can't keep up! Okay, Noel-sama, do your best!
I'll do my best!

subtitles.original: こうやってね。あ、こういう感じでね。
subtitles.english: Like this. Ah, in this way.

subtitles.original: ちょっとどんどんどんどん…あ、ちょっとジャンプしてもらってみてもいいですか？
subtitles.english:
A bit more... Ah, could you try
jumping a little?

subtitles.original: あ、ジャンプ確かに。すごいぷる…
subtitles.english: Ah, jumping, definitely. It's so jiggly...

subtitles.original: えい！よいしょ！あぶないあぶない！めっちゃあぶない！ダメダメ！あかんでしょう、これ！
subtitles.english:
Ei! There! Dangerous, dangerous!
Really dangerous! No, no! This is bad, right?!

subtitles.original: アイアイオイ！あらあ…
subtitles.english: Whoa whoa whoa! Oh my...

subtitles.original: え、ちょっとせっかくだから椅子とかも座っちゃう？椅子？
subtitles.english:
Eh, wait, since we're at it, why not sit
on the chair? Chair?

subtitles.original: うん、椅子ね、ここにありますね。はーい、椅子。よいしょ。
subtitles.english: Yeah, the chair, it's here. Okay, chair. There we go.

subtitles.original: おお、いいね！靴も可愛い！何かちょっと青っぽいんだね。
subtitles.english:
Oh, nice! The shoes are cute too!
They're kind of bluish.

subtitles.original: あ、そう、ちょこね、そこが赤なの。
subtitles.english: Ah, yeah, Choco's, the bottom part is red.

subtitles.original: ええ！あ！ちょ、ちょ、ちょ、ま、ま、まずい！
subtitles.english: Eh! Ah! Wai- wai- wai- wait, wait, this is dangerous!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！そう、そこが赤なの、これが。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! Yeah, the bottom part is red, this.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！そう。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! Yeah.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫？あ、でも何か見えてないからね。大丈夫です、大丈夫です。セーフですね。
subtitles.english:
Are you okay? Ah, but nothing's showing.
It's okay, it's okay. It's safe.

subtitles.original: 守ってます。チャンネル守ってます。
subtitles.english: I'm protecting it. I'm protecting the channel.

subtitles.original: いいじゃこうどんどんどんどん、上を見てもらって。
subtitles.english: Good, let's keep going, look up please.

subtitles.original: あ、いいね！あら可愛い！
subtitles.english: Ah, nice! Oh, cute!

subtitles.original: 見えてる？見えてるよ、見えてるよ。うん。
subtitles.english: Can you see? I can see, I can see. Yeah.

subtitles.original: 見えてる？あら可愛い！いいね！
subtitles.english: Can you see? Oh, cute! Nice!

subtitles.original: おお！いいね！あら可愛い！
subtitles.english: Oh! Nice! Oh, cute!

subtitles.original: え、ちなみにラミィさん、あれですよ。この椅子に座って先生ポーズも希望してましたけど。
subtitles.english:
Eh, by the way Lamy-san, about that.
She was also requesting the teacher pose...

subtitles.original: そう、先生ポーズ撮ってほしい。先生ポーズって何だ？こんな感じ？
subtitles.english:
Yeah, I want you to do the teacher pose.
Teacher pose? Like this?

subtitles.original: あ！いいですね、いいです。非常に。このモザイクいらないね、これは。
subtitles.english:
Ah! That's good, it's good. Extremely.
We don't need this mosaic for this.

subtitles.original: 非常に、非常に.本当にいらないの？隠そう？いや、わかんない、わかんない。
subtitles.english:
Extremely, extremely. Do we really not need it?
Should I hide it? No, I don't know...

subtitles.original: ちょこ先の魅力が溢れすぎてて。いいですね！
subtitles.english:
Choco-sen's charm is overflowing.
It's great!

subtitles.original: 素晴らしい！え、じゃ団長もいいですか？何々？
subtitles.english:
Wonderful! Eh, can I also ask for something, Danchou?
What is it?

subtitles.original: お尻フリフリちょっとしていただきたいんで.フリフリ。
subtitles.english:
I want you to wiggle your butt a little.
Wiggle wiggle.

subtitles.original: えっと、そう後ろ向いてもらって。後ろ向いてもらって。
subtitles.english: Um, yeah, turn around. Turn around please.

subtitles.original: 白衣越しだけど.フリフリ。あ、いいね！
subtitles.english:
It's through the lab coat, but... Wiggle wiggle.
Ah, nice!

subtitles.original: 白衣越しだが！あ、その下に！あ、ちょっと…
subtitles.english:
Through the lab coat! Ah, underneath that!
Ah, wait...

subtitles.original: その下に！スカート結構際どよい。
subtitles.english: Underneath that! The skirt is quite risky.

subtitles.original: でもこれ、白衣、脱いでほしいんだけど、これ脱がないの？
subtitles.english:
But this lab coat, I want you to take it off,
but won't you take it off?

subtitles.original: 脱げるけど、メンゼンって言ってた。あ、メンゼンなら脱いでくれるんですね！
subtitles.english:
I can take it off, but they mentioned the mosaic.
Ah, so you'll take it off if there's a mosaic!

subtitles.original: あーい！え、ガニ股…団長ガニ股好きなんで。
subtitles.english: Yes! Eh, bow-legged... Danchou likes bow-legged poses.

subtitles.original: うわあ！ガニ股さん！いいね！ガニ股助かる！
subtitles.english: Whoa! Bow-legged! Nice! Bow-legged is a lifesaver!

subtitles.original: ガニ股！これちょっとモザイクモザイク！
subtitles.english: Bow-legged! This needs mosaic, mosaic!

subtitles.original: ちょ、見えてるもんな.モザイクお願いします！モザイクがむしろここが？
subtitles.english:
Wait, it's showing. Mosaic please!
Is the mosaic actually here?

subtitles.original: うわあ！逆にヤバい！ヤバいヤバいヤバい！
subtitles.english:
Whoa! It's dangerous in the opposite way!
Dangerous, dangerous!

subtitles.original: ヤバいヤバい！可愛い！ふー！
subtitles.english: Dangerous, dangerous! Cute! Phew!

subtitles.original: どんどん行こうどんどん行こう.えっと…
subtitles.english: Let's keep going, let's keep going. Um...

subtitles.original: じゃ、ラストはやっぱアイドルだからさ、チョコ先、アイドル.飛び切りの可愛いアイドルお願いします。
subtitles.english:
Then, for the last one, since you're an idol,
Choco-sen, an exceptionally cute idol pose please.

subtitles.original: あーい！え、可愛い！
subtitles.english: Yes! Eh, cute!
